permission_model.trusted_context_source: x-lawos-tenant-id, x-lawos-actor-id, x-lawos-actor-role after HRX authz
restricted_actor_behavior: Restricted relationship target refs are redacted.
Conflict and ethical-wall details remain review markers unless privileged.
Raw contact values and provider payloads are never included.

verification_requirements: People search supports type, organization, Client, Matter, status, and text filters.
People detail returns profile, affiliations, Client refs, Matter refs, relationships, conflict refs, ethical-wall refs, and audit summary.
Relationship API supports person, Client, Matter, Organization, and relationship-type pivots.
HRX route policy map requires hrx.legal_people.read and fails closed for missing scope.
Restricted actors cannot view sensitive refs or restricted relationship target refs.
Production, go-live, enterprise trust, UI reflection, browser QA, and full runtime-ready candidate claims remain false.
